subject: Add unit test cases to increase sonar coverage
commit_message:
Add unit test cases to increase sonar coverage

Add unit tests to test model loader, entity statistics and data provider

Issue-ID: AAI-429

Change-Id: I18142712d2c3cc5ee48d7c6689323016da57f726
Signed-off-by: Aditya Gajulapalli <ag282f@att.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Prefer to not include the oxm file here, or is it necessary for these test cases?  It's just one more place where it has to be synced.

Patch Set 1:

> Prefer to not include the oxm file here, or is it necessary for
 > these test cases?  It's just one more place where it has to be
 > synced.

we need the oxm file for successful execution of the test cases. Regarding the place of oxm file, kindly let me know if moving it under src/test/resources would be better, So that i can go ahead and do that. Thanks

Patch Set 1:

> > Prefer to not include the oxm file here, or is it necessary for
 > > these test cases?  It's just one more place where it has to be
 > > synced.
 > 
 > we need the oxm file for successful execution of the test cases.
 > Regarding the place of oxm file, kindly let me know if moving it
 > under src/test/resources would be better, So that i can go ahead
 > and do that. Thanks

Hi Aditya,
I think what Jimmy is trying to do is to avoid a copy of oxm file in the code base and get it from aai-common in
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=aai/aai-common.git;a=tree;f=aai-schema/src/main/resources/oxm;h=ebdf665a53dd5140293d8c347fa6dadaaaa7c93b;hb=refs/heads/master

 > > Prefer to not include the oxm file here, or is it necessary for
 > > these test cases?  It's just one more place where it has to be
 > > synced.
 > 
 > we need the oxm file for successful execution of the test cases.
 > Regarding the place of oxm file, kindly let me know if moving it
 > under src/test/resources would be better, So that i can go ahead
 > and do that. Thanks
Hi Aditya,
I think what Jimmy is saying is that we should not have a oxm file in the repo and it does not matter where it is located. It should be retrieved form
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=aai/aai-common.git;a=tree;f=aai-schema/src/main/resources/oxm;h=ebdf665a53dd5140293d8c347fa6dadaaaa7c93b;hb=refs/heads/master

Either we do that or remove the test cases that depend on the file. 
regards
Arul
